Headline: #82 Kimball-Homan Temporary Reroute at Homan/Lake
ShortDescription: #82 Kimball-Homan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Homan, Madison, Kedzie, Franklin and Homan due to street blockage near Homan/Lake.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#82 Kimball-Homan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Homan, Madison, Kedzie, Franklin and Homan due to street blockage near Homan/Lake.

Allow extra travel time.
